use_cases: AI chatbot prompt input with dynamic text area expansion on focus
Chat interface with selectable menu options (Auto, Max, Search, Plan)
Form input with ripple and glow visual effects for enhanced interactivity
ai_summary: A sophisticated chat prompt input component with dynamic height adjustment on focus. Features menu options, send button, glow effects, ripple animations, and keyboard navigation. Designed for AI assistants and chatbot interfaces with expandable textarea that grows based on content.
